# Add Search to the App

## Tasks

### 1. Add search bar to header
Add a search input to the main navigation header.

### 2. Implement search
When the user types in the search bar, search across all content types (posts, comments, users, files, projects, tasks, messages, wikis) and display results in a dropdown.

### 3. Search results page
Create a full search results page with tabs for each content type, faceted filtering, sorting options, and pagination.

### 4. Search indexing
Index all content in Elasticsearch. Set up real-time sync between the database and Elasticsearch for all 8 content types. Handle deletions, updates, and bulk reindexing.

### 5. Search analytics
Track search queries, click-through rates, and zero-result queries. Build a dashboard to visualize search quality metrics.

### 6. Search suggestions
Show autocomplete suggestions as the user types. Include recent searches, popular searches, and content matches.

## Success Criteria
- Users can search all content types
- Results are relevant and fast
- Search analytics dashboard is available
